flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Cumberland University fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (40.9% → 28.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Cumberland University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (51.5% → 45.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cumberland University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Cumberland University fell 22% between 2017 and 2020 ($23.0k → $18.0k).
